title: Login Issue – User Unable to Access Account
description: Customer reports they are unable to log in even after resetting their password.

title: Payment Failure During Checkout
description: User attempted to complete purchase but payment was declined multiple times.

title: Website Loading Very Slowly
description: Customer experiencing slow loading times on the dashboard page.

title: Error 404 on Profile Page
description: User receives a 404 error when trying to access their profile settings.

title: Password Reset Email Not Received
description: Customer did not receive password reset email after multiple attempts.

title: Mobile App Crashing on Launch
description: App crashes immediately after opening on Android devices.

title: Unable to Upload Profile Picture
description: User receives an error when trying to upload a new profile photo.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount Charged
description: Customer reports being charged more than the displayed price.

title: Notification Emails Not Sending
description: System is not sending email notifications to subscribed users.

title: Search Function Not Returning Results
description: Users unable to find products using the search feature.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Code Invalid
description: Users report receiving invalid verification code during login.

title: Dark Mode UI Alignment Issue
description: UI elements overlap when dark mode is enabled.
